# aicareer.me

> Free AI career displacement risk calculator with research-backed scores for 24 careers and personalized upskilling roadmaps. Based on research from Oxford University (Frey & Osborne), McKinsey Global Institute, and the World Economic Forum Future of Jobs Report.

## Site structure

- [Home](https://aicareer.me/): Free AI displacement risk calculator. Select a career to get a risk score (0–100%) and a step-by-step upskilling roadmap with free and paid course resources.
- [About](https://aicareer.me/about/): Research methodology, primary sources, and author background (YMYL disclosure).

## AI Risk Score Methodology

Composite index across three dimensions:
- Task Routinization (40%): percentage of daily tasks that are structured and rule-based
- AI Tool Penetration (35%): existence and adoption of enterprise AI tooling in this role
- Human Judgment Dependency (25%): degree to which the role requires contextual reasoning, emotional intelligence, and novel problem-solving

Sources: Frey & Osborne (Oxford, 2013), McKinsey Global Institute (2024), WEF Future of Jobs Report (2025), Stanford HAI AI Index (2026).

## Career Risk Assessments

Each page at `/risk/[slug]/` includes: baseline risk score, automated tasks list, skills to reduce risk, FAQ, and affiliate-linked learning resources.

| Career | URL | Risk Score | Risk Level |
|---|---|---|---|
| Data Entry Clerk | https://aicareer.me/risk/data-entry-clerk/ | 95% | Critical |
| Bookkeeper | https://aicareer.me/risk/bookkeeper/ | 90% | Critical |
| Tax Preparer | https://aicareer.me/risk/tax-preparer/ | 88% | Critical |
| Customer Service Representative | https://aicareer.me/risk/customer-service-rep/ | 82% | High Risk |
| Administrative Assistant | https://aicareer.me/risk/administrative-assistant/ | 82% | High Risk |
| Accountant | https://aicareer.me/risk/accountant/ | 80% | High Risk |
| Paralegal | https://aicareer.me/risk/paralegal/ | 78% | High Risk |
| Content Writer | https://aicareer.me/risk/content-writer/ | 76% | High Risk |
| Insurance Underwriter | https://aicareer.me/risk/insurance-underwriter/ | 74% | High Risk |
| Graphic Designer | https://aicareer.me/risk/graphic-designer/ | 72% | High Risk |
| Medical Coder | https://aicareer.me/risk/medical-coder/ | 72% | High Risk |
| Loan Officer | https://aicareer.me/risk/loan-officer/ | 65% | High Risk |
| Real Estate Agent | https://aicareer.me/risk/real-estate-agent/ | 65% | High Risk |
| IT Support Specialist | https://aicareer.me/risk/it-support-specialist/ | 65% | High Risk |
| Sales Representative | https://aicareer.me/risk/sales-representative/ | 58% | Moderate |
| HR Manager | https://aicareer.me/risk/hr-manager/ | 58% | Moderate |
| Financial Analyst | https://aicareer.me/risk/financial-analyst/ | 55% | Moderate |
| Data Analyst | https://aicareer.me/risk/data-analyst/ | 45% | Moderate |
| Investment Banker | https://aicareer.me/risk/investment-banker/ | 42% | Moderate |
| Software Developer | https://aicareer.me/risk/software-developer/ | 38% | Low Risk |
| Teacher | https://aicareer.me/risk/teacher/ | 35% | Low Risk |
| Product Manager | https://aicareer.me/risk/product-manager/ | 32% | Low Risk |
| Cybersecurity Analyst | https://aicareer.me/risk/cybersecurity-analyst/ | 28% | Low Risk |
| Registered Nurse | https://aicareer.me/risk/registered-nurse/ | 22% | Low Risk |

## Research & Studies

- [AI Job Impact 2026](https://aicareer.me/study/ai-job-impact-2026/): Stanford AI Index 2026 findings crossed with all 24 career risk scores. Key data: junior developer employment fell ~20%, 1-in-3 organizations plan cuts, productivity gains range from 14–50% by field. Explains the "jagged frontier" and why entry-level roles in even "low risk" careers face displacement pressure.
- [AI Risk by Industry](https://aicareer.me/study/careers-by-industry/): 24 careers grouped into 9 industry sectors with average AI risk per sector. Finance & Accounting leads at ~70% average risk. Creative & Media is newly added — content writers (76%) and graphic designers (72%) face severe generative AI pressure. Education & HR and Administration show the mixed-risk split between admin automation and judgment-intensive core work. Includes Stanford AI Index 2026 context per sector.

## Special Resources

- [AI Literacy Skills](https://aicareer.me/special/ai-ready/): 5 universal AI skills that future-proof any career — AI literacy, prompt engineering, data literacy, workflow automation, critical AI evaluation.
- [Make Money with AI](https://aicareer.me/special/ai-entrepreneur/): 5 proven income models using AI — content services, affiliate marketing, digital products, automation consulting, prompt engineering consulting.
